title: euphorbia seguieriana subsp. niciciana
intro: Euphorbia seguieriana subsp. niciciana, also known as the Serbian spurge or Euphorbia niciciana, is a species of flowering plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia seguieriana subsp. niciciana include treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often applied topically to treat various health conditions.
